rulings.Case Title: ERIN WIDEN VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CPF-15-514666 WITH CASE CPF-15-514665
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 08, 2017 line 1. INTERVENORs DENIS HARPER and ZSUZSANNA SAPER's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CPF-15-514666 WITH CASE CPF-15-514665 GRANTED. No opposition filed. Actions shall be consolidated for all purposes and CPF-15-514665 shall be the lead case. Moving party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 08, 2017 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT ONEWEST SERVICES LLC SUED HEREIN AS ROE 3, CIT BANK, N.A.(F/K/A ONE WEST BANK N.A.)'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Second Amended Cross-Complaint sufficiently alleges all causes of action; complaint also sufficiently alleges delayed discovery. Factual disputes and the applicability of the release provision under the circumstances of this case cannot be properly addressed on a demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 08, 2017 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to file an amendment to Second Amended Cross-Complaint for Plaintiff to allege facts giving rise to claims for attorney's fees. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 11TH & KISSLING STREET TRUST VS. AIRBNB, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 08, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to December 12, 2017 for the moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than November 17, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK STREHLOW VS. MARY NICHOLS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery Propounded To Plntf And Request For Attorneys' Fees And Sanctions Against Plntf And Plntf'S Counsel, Joseph Tobener
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 08, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT MARY NICHOLS' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery Propounded To Plntf And Request For Attorneys' Fees And Sanctions Against Plntf And Plntf'S Counsel, Joseph Tobener Transferred to department 302 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on November 21, 2017. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING VS. GRISEZ BUCHANAN, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 08, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANTs GRISEZ BUCHANAN, LLC, and JEROLD GRISEZ's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint GRANTED. Cross-Complaint shall be filed and served forthwith. Any challenges to the merits of the cross-complaint shall be addressed in good faith is response to the service of the cross-complaint. Opposing party and its counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. = (501/REQ)
